title: Move Zeroes
description:
Given an integer array `nums`, move all `0`s to the end while keeping the
relative order of the non-zero elements. Return the modified array.

solutions.summary: A write pointer collects non-zeros at the front; zeros fall to the back.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature, returning `nums` unchanged.

steps.title: Add a write pointer
steps.explanation: `left` marks where the next non-zero value should go.

steps.title: Swap non-zeros forward
steps.explanation: On a non-zero, swap it into the write slot and advance `left`.
